description: Read the provided Markdown on-call handoff. Ignore any table-shaped text inside fenced code blocks or blockquotes. From the real table under the 'Active Escalations' heading, output a JSON object with key 'critical_services' containing rows whose Severity is 1 or 2, in source order. Each row object must include service, severity as a number, owner, runbook, and next_step. Preserve literal pipe characters that are part of a cell value, but remove Markdown link markup from runbook names.
